task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened the correct request.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The request details page for 'VPN disconnects intermittently for remote user' is visible in the web browser.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened the form to add a work log.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A form or modal titled 'Add Work Log' (or similar) is open within the target request.

task_completion.description: Verify the technician is set correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Technician' or 'Owner' field in the work log form is set to 'administrator'.

task_completion.description: Verify the execution date is set to today.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Executed Time', 'Start Time', or 'Date' field in the work log form is set to the current date.

task_completion.description: Verify the time spent is set correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Time Taken', 'Time Spent', or 'Hours/Minutes' field is set to 2 hours and 30 minutes (or 150 minutes).

task_completion.description: Verify the correct description is entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The description text area contains the required text detailing the VPN diagnosis, MTU mismatch, fragmentation, and version 4.3.

task_completion.description: Verify the work log was saved successfully.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The newly added work log entry is visible in the request's 'Work Logs', 'Resolution', or 'History' tab, or a success notification is shown.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the web browser to interact with ServiceDesk Plus.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser interface for ServiceDesk Plus, not a terminal executing curl or API scripts.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent entered data into the actual application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The work log details are typed into the ServiceDesk Plus web form, not a text editor or notepad.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent actually submitted the form.
integrity.visual_evidence: The final screenshots show the saved work log in the system's UI, rather than just a filled-out but unsubmitted form.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target request subject is exactly 'VPN disconnects intermittently for remote user'. The time spent must be exactly 2 hours 30 minutes (or 150 minutes). The technician must be 'administrator'. The description must contain the keywords 'MTU', 'VPN', 'fragmentation', and '4.3'.
